add_ons.name: Brandfolder
add_ons.description: Bring marketing, creative, and content together in one place. Brandfolder empowers your team to centralize, manage, and track all of your digital assets in one place.

add_ons.name: Resource Management
add_ons.description: Match people to the right work, balance workloads, and forecast demand to improve project delivery with Resource Management.

add_ons.name: Control Center
add_ons.description: Deliver project consistency and visibility at scale with automated project creation, aggregated reporting, and fast, reliable change management for portfolio-level updates.

add_ons.name: Dynamic View
add_ons.description: Share only relevant information to the right people at the right time, ensuring confidentiality without sacrificing collaboration.

add_ons.name: Data Shuttle
add_ons.description: Automate the import and export of data between Smartsheet and external systems to keep your information aligned and accurate.

add_ons.name: Calendar App
add_ons.description: A powerful, interactive and flexible calendar view that allows you to build and share calendars with custom details.

add_ons.name: DataMesh
add_ons.description: Eliminate manual work and keep your sheets and reports in sync — without manual copying and pasting or creating complex formulas.

add_ons.name: Pivot App
add_ons.description: Summarize and analyze large data stored in sheets or reports and create meaningful comparisons, and identify patterns, and trends.

add_ons.name: Connectors
add_ons.description: Sync data between Smartsheet and 3rd party systems like Jira.

add_ons.name: Bridge
add_ons.description: Create flexible workflows that work for your business with a low-code interface that lets you create simple, powerful process automations.
